stemHtml: Complete the definition of an instrument approach procedure: An instrument approach procedure means a series of predetermined manoeuvres by reference to flight instruments with specified protection from obstacles from the (1) _____, or where applicable, from the (2) _____ of a defined arrival route to a point from which a (3) _____ can be completed.

options.b: (1) Initial Approach Fix; (2) Beginning; (3) Missed Approach
options.c: (1) Final Approach Fix; (2) Beginning; (3) Missed Approach
